post.description: Creates multiple security testing targets in a single request, skipping any duplicates that already exist in the workspace. Supports both DOMAIN (root domain) and CIDR (/24 range only) types. Returns detailed results including created targets and skipped values.

get.description: Fetches a comprehensive list of all registered security testing targets within the specified workspace for vulnerability management and assessment tracking.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by target type (DOMAIN, CIDR, or IP)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by scan status (pending, in_progress, completed, failed, cancelled)

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Filter by target scope (INTERNAL or EXTERNAL)

get.summary: Get all targets in a workspace

get.description: Exports all targets in a workspace to a CSV file containing value, type (DOMAIN or CIDR), last discovered date, and creation date for reporting and analysis purposes.
Fetches detailed information about a specific security testing target using its unique identifier, including configuration and assessment status.

patch.description: Modifies the configuration and properties of an existing security testing target, allowing for dynamic adjustments to assessment parameters.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a security testing target and all its associated data (assets, vulnerabilities, jobs, and related records) from the specified workspace.

post.description: Initiates a comprehensive security re-assessment of the specified target, triggering new vulnerability scans to identify potential security risks.
Establishes a new isolated security workspace for organizing and managing assets, targets, and vulnerabilities within a dedicated environment.

get.description: Fetches a comprehensive list of security workspaces that the authenticated user has access to, providing multi-tenant organization capabilities.

parameters.name: isArchived
parameters.description: Whether to archive (true) or unarchive (false) the workspace

get.description: Retrieves the authentication API key for secure access to the specified workspace, enabling programmatic interactions with workspace resources.
Retrieves the configuration settings for a specified workspace, including asset discovery and auto-enablement settings.

patch.description: Updates the configuration settings for a specified workspace, including asset discovery and auto-enablement options.

get.description: Fetches detailed information about a specific security workspace using its unique identifier, including all associated metadata and configuration.

patch.description: Modifies the configuration and metadata of an existing security workspace, allowing for dynamic adjustments to workspace settings and properties.

delete.description: Permanently removes a security workspace and all its associated data, including assets, targets, vulnerabilities, and configurations.

post.description: Generates a new API key for the specified workspace, invalidating the previous key to enhance security and maintain authorized access.

patch.description: Changes the archival status of a workspace, allowing for temporary deactivation or reactivation of workspace resources without permanent deletion.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all available workflow templates in YAML format.
Retrieves a paginated list of workflows within the specified workspace. Supports filtering by name.

post.description: Creates a new workflow with the provided data.

get.description: Retrieves a specific workflow by its ID within the specified workspace.

patch.description: Updates an existing workflow with the provided data.

delete.description: Deletes a workflow by its ID.

post.description: Creates the first admin user in the system.
post.summary: Creates the first admin user in the system.

get.description: Returns metadata about the system state, like whether it has been initialized.
Returns the latest version information stored in Redis.
Retrieves the current system configuration settings

delete.description: Removes the system logo and reverts to default avatar

get.description: Retrieves a list of jobs that the user is a member of.
Retrieves a timeline of jobs grouped by tool name and target.

get.summary: Retrieves the next job associated with the given worker that has not yet been started.

post.summary: Updates the result of a job with the given worker ID.

get.description: Retrieves a list of job histories in the current workspace with their associated jobs, assets, and targets.
Retrieves a job history detail with its associated workflow and jobs.

post.description: Reset job status to pending, clear workerId, and increment retry count
Cancel a job by its ID in the specified workspace

delete.description: Delete a job by its ID in the specified workspace

parameters.description: Filter assets created on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

post.description: Toggle the enabled/disabled status of an asset.

post.description: Registers a new security assessment tool in the system with specified configuration and capabilities.

get.description: Search assets and targets

delete.description: Delete all search history entries for the user
Delete a specific search history entry by its ID

parameters.description: Filter by creation date to (ISO 8601 format, e.g., 2026-01-31)

get.description: Provides aggregated statistical analysis of security vulnerabilities categorized by severity levels, enabling risk assessment and prioritization of remediation efforts.

post.description: Initiates an AI-powered analysis of a specific security vulnerability to provide detailed insights and recommendations.

delete.description: Removes the AI analysis result from a vulnerability and resets its status to not analyzed.

post.description: Dismisses multiple security vulnerabilities identified within the system, removing them from active tracking and analysis.
Reopens multiple security vulnerabilities identified within the system, restoring them to active tracking and analysis.

info.title: Open Attack Surface Management
info.description: Open-source platform for cybersecurity Attack Surface Management (ASM)

TargetType.description: The type of target (DOMAIN, CIDR, or IP)

value.description: The target value (domain, IP address, or CIDR notation)

type.description: The type of target (DOMAIN, CIDR, or IP)

skipped.description: List of target values that were skipped (already exist)

totalRequested.description: Total number of targets requested to create

totalCreated.description: Total number of targets successfully created

value.description: The target value (domain, IP address, or CIDR notation)

type.description: The type of target (DOMAIN, CIDR, or IP)

targets.description: Array of target values to create. Supports DOMAIN (root domain), CIDR (/24 range only), and IP (single IP address) types.

isAssetsDiscovery.title: Asset discovery
isAssetsDiscovery.description: Automatically scan and detect internet-facing assets (domains, IPs) in workspace networks

isAutoEnableAssetAfterDiscovered.title: Auto enable assets
isAutoEnableAssetAfterDiscovered.description: Newly discovered assets become active immediately without manual review

dek.description: Encrypted Data Encryption Key (DEK) for this workspace. Encrypted with system KEK. Null for workspaces created before envelope encryption.

isAssetsDiscovery.title: Asset discovery
isAssetsDiscovery.description: Automatically scan and detect internet-facing assets (domains, IPs) in workspace networks

isAutoEnableAssetAfterDiscovered.title: Auto enable assets
isAutoEnableAssetAfterDiscovered.description: Newly discovered assets become active immediately without manual review
Whether assets are auto-enabled after discovery

targetCount.description: Number of targets in the workspace

memberCount.description: Number of members in the workspace

role.description: Role of the current user in the workspace

isArchived.description: Whether to archive (true) or unarchive (false) the workspace

id.description: The unique identifier of the workflow

filePath.description: The file path of the workflow

updatedAt.description: When the workflow was last updated

createdBy.description: The user who created this workflow

workspace.description: The workspace this workflow belongs to

content.description: Content of the workflow in JSON format
Content of the workflow in JSON format

tags.description: The generated tags for the service

assetServiceId.description: The ID of the asset service to generate tags for

total.description: Total count of issues timeline records

count.description: The number of assets associated with the tag
Number of IP addresses in this country

high.description: The number of high severity vulnerabilities

medium.description: The number of medium severity vulnerabilities

low.description: The number of low severity vulnerabilities

info.description: The number of info severity vulnerabilities

forceRerun.description: Force rerun analysis even if already analyzed

contextWindow.description: Custom context window size in tokens. Overrides API-provided value.

isAcceptCustomApiUrl.description: Whether provider accepts custom API URL
Whether provider accepts custom API URL

contextWindow.description: Custom context window size in tokens. Overrides API-provided value.

summary.description: Summarized context of previous conversation turns

workerId.description: The worker ID currently assigned to this conversation

parts.description: Chronological parts array preserving the real order of reasoning, tool calls, and text.

question.example: Hello, how can you help me?

conversationId.description: Continue existing conversation. If not provided, a new conversation is created.

model.description: Override model name for new conversations

workerId.description: Preferred worker ID for remote command execution. Only respected when agentMode is "agent".

content.example:
## Key Facts
- User prefers concise answers
- Target scope: internal network

recipients.description: List of user IDs to receive the notification

metadata.description: Metadata for the notification content (variables for translation)

schema.description: JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) with oneOf discriminated union by app_type + category

config.description: App-specific configuration validated via JSON Schema
App-specific configuration validated via JSON Schema

text.description: Optional custom test message text. Defaults to a standard test message per category.

botUsername.description: Bot username from Telegram API, e.g. "MyAwesomeBot"

hexColor.description: Hex color of the asset group

workflowIds.description: Array of workflow IDs to add

assetIds.description: Array of asset IDs to add

workflowIds.description: Array of workflow IDs to remove

assetIds.description: Array of asset IDs to remove

name.description: The name of the internal network

networkInterfaceIds.description: Array of network interface IDs to create targets from

agents.description: The number of agents connected to this internal network

name.description: The updated name of the internal network

endDate.description: End date for summary report filter
